_comment: Curated holdings showcase — single source of truth for render_holdings.py, the README block it generates, and screenshot_apps.sh. Fields: repo (required); owner (default maxmoneycash); url (live deploy to AUTO-screenshot + default link; empty = no auto-shot, use the manual assets/shots/<repo>.jpg and never overwrite it); link (where the card click goes; defaults to url, else the repo). Drop a manual shot at assets/shots/<repo>.jpg to set/override a banner.
